name: DYO Boya Fabrikalari Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Dyo Boya Fabrikalari Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. researches, develops, manufactures, markets, and sells paints in Turkey. The company offers construction, thermal insulation, furniture coatings, marine coatings, dyotransocean coatings, coil coatings, industrial coatings, polyester, defense industry coatings, automotive repair coatings, and powder coatings. It also provides varnishes, resins, construction chemicals, and various paint application equipment. The company was founded in 1927 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey. DYO Boya Fabrikalari Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. is a subsidiary of Yasar Holding A.S.
